info.title: Gapi
info.description: REST API for the Orbit frontend

post.summary: Log in with username and password

get.summary: Log out and revoke session token
Get current session introspection
Get user by ID

put.summary: Update user (admin role update or self-update)

get.summary: Generate TOTP secret for MFA setup

post.summary: Complete MFA login with a TOTP code
Confirm and save a TOTP secret

get.summary: List all entity configs for the current user

put.summary: Set access policy for an entity config
Set unique constraints for an entity config

get.summary: List entities
Get a single entity

put.summary: Set access policy for an entity

get.summary: List all list configs
Get a single list config
Get a list with entities (public or owned)

put.summary: Update the filter for a list config
Update the sort for a list config
Update the themes for a list config
Set access policy for a list config

post.summary: Create a property config (standard or calculated)

put.summary: Update a property config (standard or calculated)

get.summary: Get property value suggestions
Get all settings for the current user and system
Search tags by prefix
Get tag suggestions for an entity description

post.summary: Perform a bulk operation on entities

get.summary: List all access policies
List all access policy groups
Search for access policy parties (users or groups)
List all workspaces
Get a workspace by ID
Get medals awarded to the current user
List medal configs
Get a medal config

delete.summary: Nuke data by operation type (requires ENABLE_NUKE=1)

get.summary: List streak alert configs for the current user
List saved streak configs with current and longest counts
List saved fact configs with current resolved values

delete.summary: Invalidate all fact cache entries for the current user
Invalidate a specific fact cache entry
Invalidate the cache for a single saved fact config
Invalidate the cache for a single saved streak config

get.summary: Get leaderboard scores
List comments for an entity (owners see unpublished comments too)

post.summary: Post a comment as an authenticated user or guest

patch.summary: Publish or unpublish a comment (entity owner only)

delete.summary: Delete a comment (entity owner or comment author)

post.summary: Like or dislike a comment (authenticated users or guests, deduped by user/IP)

delete.summary: Remove your reaction from a comment

get.summary: Get current weather for all configured locations
Trigger AI list config suggestions (system only)

post.summary: Proxy an entity to the AI assist service

get.summary: Check AI assist service health

post.summary: Create AI-suggested entities for a date (system only)

get.summary: Accept a suggested entity via one-time token
Generate Google OAuth URL for account linking
OAuth callback — saves Google account and redirects
Get Google Calendar events for the linked account
